genre_refs: Truth Social / X post screenshot card
description: A graphic styled as a screenshot of a social-media post from Trump, on a white background. At the top is a circular profile avatar showing Trump's face with an American-flag overlay, next to the name 'Donald J. Trump' (with a pink/magenta checkmark badge and a small dark app icon) and the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The post body, in large black sans-serif text, reads: 'I want to thank Dr. Marty Makary for having done a great job at the FDA. So much was accomplished under his leadership. He was a hard worker, who was respected by all, and will go on to have an outstanding career in Medicine. Kyle Diamantas, a very talented person, will be put in the Acting position. President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump: 'I want to thank Dr. Marty Makary for having done a great job at the FDA... Kyle Diamantas, a very talented person, will be put in the Acting position. President DONALD J. TRUMP'
